name: Endless Tide
descriptionTemplate:
{Vortex! Shell!} additionally deals {Fixed DMG} equal to 0.5% Target's Max HP. Realm Mastery +50 after using {Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!}.
For each point of Realm Mastery that Vortice, her WoDs, and Covenants have: {Vortex! Shell!} deals extra {Fixed DMG} equal to 0.005% of Target's Max HP, and the Realm Mastery gained after casting {Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!} is increased by 0.5.
